companyNameJapanese: 日本酸素ホールディングス株式会社
description: Japan's largest industrial gas company, part of Mitsubishi Chemical Group. World top 3 for electronics-related gases. Supplies specialty gases and bulk gases for semiconductor manufacturing.

_externalRelationships.notes: Supplying gases for Rapidus pilot line. Developing ultra-high-purity air separation equipment for new fabs.
